'''ân-j-k-y''' ('''kanajkeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tiller|tiller]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tiller|tiller]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-j-k-y
|-
! Lemma
| kanajkeyoko
|}
